response.objective_caption: A woman wearing sunglasses rests her chin on her hand while leaning out of the open window of an old-fashioned train traveling through a densely forested area with tall trees. response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A woman wearing sunglasses rests her chin on her hand while leaning out of the open window of an old-fashioned train traveling through a densely forested area with tall trees, the entire scene bathed in desaturated, washed-out warm tones with a retro faded palette.
